meta.title: Blue Prince — Room & Item Log
meta.note: Spoiler-free notepad. Starts empty on purpose — rooms, items, puzzles and notes are added from your own play via a Claude chat (committed to main); the viewer reads this file same-origin.

tips.title: How to log
tips.body: This is a spoiler-free notepad that starts empty. Tell the logging chat what you find — a room and what it does, an item, a code, a puzzle clue or answer, or send a photo — and it files it. It decides whether each thing is permanent or run-specific.

tips.title: Permanent vs run-specific
tips.body:
Permanent (kept across runs): lore & story, codes/combinations, maps, photos of in-game notes, puzzle answers, fixed room facts.
Run-specific (ephemeral): this run's random room contents.
Rule of thumb — will it still be true next run? Yes → permanent.

tips.title: Photos & images
tips.body: Entries can include a picture — send the photo to the logging chat and it commits it to images/ and links it. Great for in-game letters, maps, or floorplans.
